source: 2026-06 and 2026-07 have full category breakdowns pulled live via Facebook Ads MCP on 2026-07-12 (2026-07 = month-to-date 1-12 Jul). 'inter' = sum of campaigns with "Inter" in the name inside the Nose Open 02 ad account (confirmed with the team on 2026-07-12), not a whole ad account; because those campaigns are also inside nose_open, the month 'total' is the sum of the 6 ad accounts (no inter double-count) rather than the sum of the category fields. Months with only a 'total' field are carried over from previous manual pulls until the scheduled workflow backfills them.
